title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-1010
summary: 1 On November 10, 1953, an 18-count indictment was returned in the United States District Court for the District of Columbia, charging the appellee, a former member of Congress, with violations of 18 U.S.C. § 1001.1 During the course of the trial a judgment of acquittal was ordered on counts 8 th...
